name: Shanghai Fullhan Microelectronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Fullhan Microelectronics Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells chips and solutions for video surveillance products in China. The company offers H.264 codec SoC, image signal processor IC products, and analog and IP cameras, as well as IoT and vehicle application products. The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
